cards.main_claim: Cache-aware batching improves toy training throughput by 1.3x while matching the baseline validation curve.

figures.alt_text: Loss curve comparing baseline and cache-aware batching
figures.caption: The proposed method reaches the same final loss after 180 seconds.
figures.visual_observation: The cache-aware curve converges with the baseline curve.

evidence_needed: Verify throughput increase from 42 to 55 tok/s
Verify final validation loss matches baseline

cards.main_claim: The method is elegant and easy to use.
